welcome:
[wave]Hello! :)[/wave]

[rainbow]I hope this finds you well ;)[/rainbow]

This is a tiny little thing I cooked up over a weekend to get back to doing fun experimental stuff like I used to.

[wheel]Tap on the letter to close and get a new one.[/wheel]
All letters are personal notes from real people.

All the best <3
(26.12.'23)
